description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 1 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
.
2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉1⽇作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
。

2026-06-15T23:59:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that, as informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail
train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shantou Station: G6574, G6578, G6392

From Shantou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G6573, G6577, G6389

From Zhaoqingdong Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G6233

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Zhaoqingdong Station：G6580

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: G6518, G6520, G6538, G6528, G6530, G6582, G6584

From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G6517, G6519, G6521, G6527, G6529, G6533, G6581, G6583

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306.cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon
Station.

You may consider traveling on the East Rail Line trains to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau to go to the Chinese Mainland.

For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app.
2026-06-15T23:59:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消：

由香港西九龍站前往汕頭站: G6574, G6578, G6392

由汕頭站前往香港西九龍站: G6573, G6577, G6389

由肇慶東站前往香港西九龍站: G6233

由香港西九龍站前往肇慶東站: G6580

由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站: G6518, G6520, G6538, G6528, G6530, G6582, G6584

由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站: G6517, G6519, G6521, G6527, G6529, G6533, G6581, G6583

有關最新車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲前往中國內地。

如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式。

2026-06-16T06:15:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that, as informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shantou Station: G6574, G6578, G6392

From Shantou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G6573, G6577, G6389

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Zhaoqingdong Station：G6580

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: G6518, G6520, G6538, G6528, G6530, G6582, G6584

From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G6517, G6519, G6521, G6527, G6529, G6533, G6581, G6583

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306.cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.

You may consider travel on the East Rail Line trains to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Chinese Mainland.

For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app.
2026-06-16T06:15:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消：

由香港西九龍站前往汕頭站：G6574,G6578,G6392

由汕頭站前往香港西九龍站：G6573,G6577,G6389

由香港西九龍站前往肇慶東站：G6580

由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站：G6518,G6520,G6538,G6528,G6530,G6582,G6584

由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站：G6517,G6519,G6521,G6527,G6529,G6533,G6581,G6583

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲，或使用其他跨境交通工具前往中國內地。

如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式。

2026-06-16T18:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-06-16T18:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-06-17T08:53:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following temporary train trips will be added:

Travelling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Beijingxi Station (sleeper train)
● 18 Jun: G897, G898

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station
● 19 Jun: G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
● 21 Jun: G5866

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station
● 21 Jun: G9540, G5680

From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
● 19 Jun: G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867
● 21 Jun: G5865

From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
● 21 Jun: G5679

From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
● 19 Jun: G9539

Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.

For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-06-17T08:53:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次：

來往香港西九龍站及北京西站(臥鋪)
●6月18日：G897,G898

由香港西九龍站前往福田站
●6月19日：G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
●6月21日：G5866

由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站
●6月21日：G9540,G5680

由福田站前往香港西九龍站
●6月19日：G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867
●6月21日：G5865

由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站
●6月21日：G5679

由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站
●6月19日：G9539

乘客可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。

有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) train service enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路（香港段）進一步提升列車服務

2026-06-17T10:35:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following train service adjustments will come into effect on 1 July:
•Schedules and stopping stations of some train trips will be adjusted
•6 additional train trips to Futian Station and 7 additional train trips from Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station will operate

Tickets for train trips operating under the new timetable are now available for
sale.

Ticket purchase: 
•12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app 
•Appointed travel agents 
•Hong Kong West Kowloon Station 

Train schedules: 
•12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app 
•High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-06-17T10:35:00.CONTENT_CN:
中國內地鐵路部門通報，由7月1日起，列車服務將作出以下調整： 
•部份列車班次時間及停靠站調整。
•新增6班前往福田站及7班由福田站前往香港西九龍站的列車。

按新時間表運行的列車車票現已開始發售。

購票方法： 
•12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 
•指定代理
•前往香港西九龍站 

列車服務詳情： 
•12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 
•高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced train service for Tuen Ng Festival long weekend
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港鐵端午節長周末加強服務

2026-06-17T12:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that East Rail Line train frequency will be increased during certain periods for the Tuen Ng Festival long weekend (18 – 21 June).
2026-06-17T12:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 東鐵綫於端午節期間(6月18 –21日)部分時段加強列車服務。

2026-06-18T06:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-06-18T06:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-06-18T11:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-06-18T11:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-06-18T12:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Black Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-06-18T12:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 黑色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-06-18T13:25:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to bad weather conditions, preventative flooding measures are in place. The following entrances/exits are temporarily closed. Please use other entrances/exits.
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.
2026-06-18T13:25:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於天氣情況惡劣，以下車站出入口暫時關閉以便作防護措施。請使用其他出入口。
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm。

2026-06-18T13:35:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry/ kaito ferry services will be or have been adjusted:
Tsui Wah Ferry Service (H. K.) Limited
‘Wong Shek – Ko Lau Wan – Tap Mun’ Route:
- Wong Shek to Tap Mun: Last sailing at 2:30p.m.
- Tap Mun to Wong Shek: Last sailing at 1:45p.m.
2026-06-18T13:35:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪/街渡渡輪服務將會或已經作出調整：
翠華船務（香港）有限公司
「黃石-高流灣-塔門」航線：
-黃石至塔門：尾班船於下午2時30分開出/暫停服務
-塔門至黃石：尾班船於下午1時45分開出/暫停服務。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Certain entrance/exits of Hong Kong West Kowloon Station closed
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 香港西九龍站部分出入口暫時關閉

2026-06-18T13:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to adverse weather conditions, Entrance/Exit C at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station is closed. Please use other entrances/exits. High Speed Rail train service remains normal.
2026-06-18T13:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於天氣情況惡劣，香港西九龍站C出入口暫時關閉，請使用其他出入口。 高速鐵路服務維持正常。
